    Home › Airlines › Air China

    CA Air China

    China · Star Alliance · Hub: Beijing Capital (PEK)

    China's flag carrier — the only airline that flies the national flag on its tail.

    Types in fleet7
    Biggest aircraftBoeing 747
    AllianceStar Alliance
    Founded1988
    IATACA

    Good to know

    Air China, in a few facts

    • One of only three airlines flying the passenger 747-8.
    • Its 747-8s double as China's state aircraft for leadership flights.

    About the data. Every specification is compiled from manufacturer documents and cited per row. Operator fleet counts are approximate snapshots, marked ≈ and dated; individually verified figures carry a ✓. All silhouettes are original works of aircraft.fyi, drawn to true scale. Corrections and enquiries: business@luck.fyi — we fix errors visibly, not silently.
